key.name: window-width
key.description: Width of the main window in pixels.

key.name: window-height
key.description: Height of the main window in pixels.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window is maximized.

key.name: view-mode
key.description: Collection view mode: icon or list.

key.name: default-ram
key.description: Default RAM in MB for new VMs.

key.name: default-vcpus
key.description: Default number of virtual CPUs for new VMs.

key.name: default-disk-size
key.description: Default disk size in GB for new VMs.

key.name: backend-preference
key.description: Preferred virtualization backend: auto, libvirt, qemu, ssh.
